variants: Suara Sikandar was born on Cloudmarsh Isle, where her early fascination with the natural world began. Currently, she resides in Pinehollow Terraces, a community known for its artistic spirit. Her innovative spirit is showcased through her invention, the Nebula Weave Filter, which has garnered her significant recognition. For her contributions, Suara has been awarded the Bronze Canopy Medal, celebrating her impactful work. In addition to her professional endeavors, she is also an active member of the Apricot Spelunkers Group, where she shares her love for exploration and creativity.
